title: skill.executed v1
description: Event emitted when a skill invocation completes, regardless of task state. Distinct from task.completed: a single task may involve multiple skill invocations. skill.executed fires once per invocation.

type.description: Message type discriminator. Always 'skill.executed' for this schema.

source.description: Bus identity of the agent that executed the skill.

target.description: Bus channel this message is published to. Defaults to 'sos:channel:skills'.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at which this message was emitted.

version.description: Schema version of this message. SemVer — major.minor or major.minor.patch.

message_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this message instance. UUID v4 recommended.

trace_id.description: W3C Trace Context trace-id (32 hex chars). Optional; minted at ingress when absent.

payload.description: Data describing the completed skill invocation.

skill_id.description: Identifier of the skill that was invoked.

invocation_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this specific skill invocation. UUID v4.

agent.description: Name of the agent that executed the skill.

started_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at which the skill invocation began.

completed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at which the skill invocation ended.

success.description: True if the skill completed without error, false otherwise.

task_id.description: Task that triggered this skill invocation, if applicable.

tokens_spent.description: Total LLM tokens consumed during this skill invocation.

cost_cents.description: Computed cost of this skill invocation in US cents.

error.description: Structured error detail. Present when success is false.

code.description: SOS error code in the format SOS-XXXX.

traceback.description: Full stack trace or exception chain. Optional.
